headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Overweight on Interactive Brokers Group, Raises Price Target to $105
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Patrick Moley   maintains Interactive Brokers Group (NASDAQ:IBKR) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $88 to $105.

headline: Is Interactive Brokers Group (IBKR) One of the Top Wonderful Stocks to Buy Now?
summary: Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:IBKR) is one of the top wonderful stocks to buy now. Barclays lifted the price target on Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:IBKR) to $108 from $93 on July 9 and maintained an Overweight rating on the shares. For additional reference, Interactive Brokers Group, Inc.
